title: echiochilon cryptocephalum
intro: Echiochilon cryptocephalum is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Native to the Mediterranean region, it is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, thanks to its expectorant properties. Echiochilon cryptocephalum is also valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and providing relief from various health issues.
